titleStmt.title: SII 20.107: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 107. (B.K. No. 1 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the king's regnal year 13, Kālayukta, Mārggaśira, puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, saṁkramaṇa. The date is irregular. In the cyclic year Kālayukta, the given tithi fell on Friday, November 18, A.D. 1138. There was neither lunar eclipse nor saṁkramaṇa on this day. In the previous year Piṅgaḷa, the tithi fell on Monday, November 29, A.D. 1137, but the other details do not agree.

The inscription registers a gift of the kiṛukuḷa taxes and the gold income due from the dēvabhōga of the village Niṭṭūru, made in favour of the god Svayaṁbhu Dakshiṇa-Sōmanāthadēva at Purikara, by Jayakēsidēvarasa of the Sagara family, in conjunction with the One Thousand, headed by Tantrapāḷa Chaṭṭimayya-nāyaka, to the sthānāchārya Jñānasōma-paṇḍitadēva in the presence of Daṇḍanāyaka Chiddarasa, Mahādēvarasa and the Mahājanas of rājadhāni-paṭṭaṇa Purigeṛe, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷasthaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ©
śrīmaddēvēṁdrabṛṁdōditaviditamahatpūjyapūjāvaḷīśragdhāmōddāmābhirāmaṁ namadamaravadhū
kuntaḷaśrēṇilīlādāmāṁghṛdvaṁdvanurvvīnutapurikarasanmaṇḍanaṁ sōmanāthaṁ śrī maccāḷukyabhūparggabhimataphaḷamaṁ
māḷkatiprītiyiṁda . baḷavaccōḷikacāḷanaṁ magadhamāḍhaṁgollahṛtsellanaṁdhralayō grāntakano darppa
daḷanaṁ kirmmīrasaṁhārapraḷeyaṁ gūrjjaratarjjanaṁ ḍahaḷadōrddarppāpahaṁ pāṇḍyanirddaḷanaṁ kēvaḷamēṁ babāppa
nupamaṁ śrī vikramōrvvīśvaraṁ . tatputraṁ . ka . madavetti naḍeva rāyagaḍaṇa manudyatpratāpata
panātapadiṁ naḍe koragisuvuddhatikege paḍiyāvōṁ vīrarāya sōmēśvaranoḷ . vṛtta . Ānatōrvvīpāḷaraṁ ma
rddisi vijeyabhujōtpātatīkṣṇāsiyiṁ neṭṭane pādākrāntabhūpāḷaranapagatabādhā kararmmāḍi kīrttyaṁgane
yaṁ dikkāminīsaṁgamadoḷirisidī rājasarvajñabhūpaṁ tanagēkacchatramaṁ māḍidaneḷeya niḷāpāḷa ttrailōkya
malla © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvara vijeyarājyamutta rōttarābhivṛddhiprava
rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . v® . janamellaṁ pogaḷguṁ kaḷā viditavidyābhyāsanaṁ kāḷidāsanana
hṛtsantrāsanaṁ kāḷidāsananaṁgīkritamaṁtraśāstrapadalīlāvāsanaṁ kāḷidāsananā pāditakīrti nartti
drājādhipapadābjaśiḷīmukhanuddhatāridōrmmadakadanōgraṣaṇmukhananēkakaḷākaḷitācatu rmmukhaṁ . vidita
ṇditadaṇḍanāthasaṁpadanesedaṁ dharitriyoḷaḷaṁkritavikramanī trivikramaṁ . ka . Eraḍaṟu nūṟuma
tikkarasarpparārtthakēḷīcaritarppratipāḷisuttamire sukhadinda . svasti samastapraśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
verggaḍe kannaḍasandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ tikkarasaraḷiyaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyaka cidda
taveṁdaḍe . v® . ripudaṇḍādhipadarppadaṇḍanakaraṁ dōrddaṇḍacaṇḍāsivārapuraṁdhrīsmita lōcanōtpaḷa
rttipayōrāśiparītabhūribhuvanaprakhyātameṁdiṁtu baṇnipudurvvīvaḷeyaṁ camūpa tiḷakaṁ śrīciddada
tadaṇḍādhipakamaḷaśaṇḍamadavēdaṇḍaṁ pāṇḍarakīrttijyōtsnāmaṇḍananesedaṁ dharitri yoḷu ciddarasa . svasti sa
yaka ciddarasara deseyiṁ . samastapraśastisahita śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ mahā dēvarasa
haviśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷdarasugeyyuttamire . vaṁ nāḷprabhu tāṁ ruhananiṁda
dbhavaṁ janakanātmīyāṁnvayā dhūcaṁdrānane caṁdrikāsati lasanmātā bdhiyeṁdandu viśvada
mahādēvanoḷ . hrideyaṁ kāruṇyapīṭhaṁ dharage vaktraṁ vacaśrīyaṁ bhaṇḍārada sadmaṁ taṁna
benalu durmmadaroḷu kāḷēyadaṇḍādhipaṁ ye sanmaṁtravidyāvivēkaika dṛḍhaṁ saujanyalakṣmīpati
paduḷaṁ nīṁṭi niyōgāvanige kamaṭhanādaṁ pogaḷdāvagaṁ korvvida tējō bhānu koḍeya kuvaranā daṁḍigantā
ye kuḍiga nātmīyavaṁśābhyudeyaṁ kādaṁbarā kiṟukuḷana mahādēva daṇṇādhinātha .
tāḷdidaṁ toṭṭane toṭṭevoṁdeṁ kōri para pālakaṁ karccida kuḍagadindaṁ rāmanandā jaḷanidhiya gabhīratva
vaṁśōttamanenipa mahādēvadaṇdādhinātha . © saranidhiparivṛtadhareyoḷu bharatāvani yesegumalli kuntaḷa
viṣayāṁtaradoḷu raṁjipudaniṁdya purikaranagara . Ā dēśādhīśvaravaṁśāvatāra menteṁdoḍī sūryyavaṁ
rssagaraṁ sāgarikīrtti gaṁgākīrti bhagīrathiyeṁba mahimeyaṁ tāḷdidā sūryya vaṁśadoḷu puṭṭidaṁ jayakēsidēvanā jaya
sidēvanuṁ vajradantanuṁ puṭṭidaru vajradantaṁgaṁ kadaṁbānvayada mādaladēvigaṁ puṭṭida jayakēsidēvana mahāprabhāvameṁteṁ
lōkavipattu ṭaḷamaṁ diṁ tūḷde rāgadinātmānvitamāge viśvavasudhā paṁkēruhaṁ tanna korvvida tējaṁ parivṛddhiyiṁ bhuvana
meṁbudeyādrīṁdramanēṟidaṁ sagaramūrttaṇḍaṁ jaganmaṇḍana . jayajāyābhujugāṁga ṇaṁ maḷeyajastaṁbha bhujastaṁbhamanvayalakṣmī
jakuḷaṁ vakṣasthaḷaṁ vāgvadhūpriyakīrtimaṇipaṁjaraṁ mukhamenalvikhyātiyaṁ tāḷdidaṁ jayakēśikṣitipāḷakaṁ nijayaśa
ḷake nagegaṇṇoḷu matsyarūpaṁ . caraṇayugaḷadoḷu kūrmmarūpaṁ sukaṇṭhō jjugadādikrōḍarūpaṁ . naḍuvinoḷu nṛsiṁ mākāra
diṁdaṁ pogaḷalu sārjjagadātmaprabheyoḷeseva rāmatrayava matiprauḍhige buddhaṁ kalkigaṁ poṁdada hariyenipaṁ sā pabhū
paṁ . ka . Avanatargge dharmmahastavanavayavadiṁ nīḍi bāṇa yoḷavaratavaṁ koṇḍuṁ dhārmmikanenisuvanī jayakēsidē viparīta .
ślōka . jayakēsimahīpāḷaḥ pāḷitāśēṣabhūtaḷaḥ bhūtaḷastutasatkīrttiḥ kīrttibyāpta jagatrayaṁ . praśasti . svasti punṛpatiśi
raśphēdakaprabhāvaprasiddhadigvijeyaśāsanaṁ cakravarttiprabhāvōcitarājyacihnādhipati sapta samudradvīpā sūryyavaṁśāṁbara
dyumaṇi . samyaktacūḍāmaṇi . kṣatriyapavitraḥ . kadanatriṇētraṁ . sagaramārttaṇḍa śrīmanmahā jayakēsidēvarasaruṁ
taṁtrapāḷa caṭṭimayyanāyakanuṁ haḍavaḷa malliyaṇa . toṭṭagavuṁḍa . Eṟabhaṭṭanu . nākaṇa ya kāḷeyanāyakanuṁ .
mukhyavāgi samasta sāyiraparigrahaṁgaḷuṁ . © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī hāpradhāna sēnādhipati kaḍitaverggaḍe kannaḍasa
ndhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ ciddarasara samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna daṇṇanāyakaṁ mahādēvarasara śrīmadrājadhā
nipaṭṭaṇaṁ purigeṟeya nagara mahājanaṁ paṁcamaṭha sthānaṁgaḷa seṭṭipramukha taḷasamastamuṁ . mūnūṟara prabhu gāvuṇḍugaḷaśē
ṣamiralavara sannidhānadalu . © svasti śrī maccāḷukyasarvajñabhūlōkamalla varṣada hadimūṟeneya kālayuktasaṁvatsarada mārggaśira
suddha puṇnami sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇa byatīpāta saṁkramaṇadaṁdu śrīsvayaṁbhu dakṣiṇasōmanāthadēvaraṁgabhōgakke dēvabhōgaṁ niṭṭū
raṟoravege naḍeva manneyada honnumaṁ kā kāyadāya kiṟukuḷa vinitumanalliya sthānācāryya śrīmajñānasōmapaṇḍitadē
vara kālaṁ kacci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ sarbbabādhāparihāra sarbbanamaśya māgi caṁdrārkkatāraṁ naḍevantāgi biṭṭaru . © © ka . © .
© rakṣadoḷī dharmma rakṣisidaṁgatuḷapuṇyamidanaḷidātaṁgakṣayanarakaṁ nijavaṁśakṣayavātaṁ dharitriyoḷu cāṇḍāḷa . ślōka .
svadattāṁ para vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . © bareda sandhivigrahiyāditya .
Digital edition of SII 20.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
